title: Would you chug down Shinjis Now you can
display_title: Would you chug down Shinjis Now you can
wikitext:
[]: Would you chug down Shinji's *****? Now you can! Post by Xard » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:00 pm Here we have commercialization that's just too good to pass by! "Sauce" TL of product description "I'm the lowest" This is a cocktail modeled after "that liquid" which remained on Shinji's hand after he had ended up stripping sleeping Asuka. We especially recommend this to females. (04: KC) edit: what/why explanation here

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:03 pm

[]: Post by Angel of Will » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:08 pm

[]: Post by Chuckman » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:08 pm Well, I'd say this franchise has been run into the ground.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:12 pm I... uh... whu... ugh... no words... just...

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:16 pm Japan, you are and forever will be, THE BEST

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:17 pm Wut??? WTFJAPAN

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:21 pm To be perfectly serious though, what publication is the source of that? Is it from that Eva Cafe that's suppose to open? EDIT: This? http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2863.html

[]: Post by Joy Evangelion » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:23 pm the Nerv cup wrote: ~THE ORIGINAL~

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:24 pm As if I need confirmation that my heart belongs in the Muppet fandom...

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:28 pm Just when I thought this fandom couldn't be more fucked up. Once again, thank you Xard. Some of us actually want to CONTINUE to like Shinji, thank-you-very-much.

[]: Post by Lord ikari shinji » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:29 pm ikari juices

[]: Post by Jayfive » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:53 pm Oh Japan. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Wanderlust » Thu Feb 20, 2014 8:54 pm Obviously a plot by Anno to sicken the otaku to the point that they'll finally stop masturbating to animated 14 year old girls.

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:02 pm xanderkh wrote: Once again, thank you Xard. Some of us actually want to CONTINUE to like Shinji, thank-you-very-much.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:11 pm Xard wrote: Once again? Wait, what have I done before?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:30 pm Well it's Japan that did that. Xard is simply informing us of it, which is always great and he deserves the thanks for going through the effort to bring us news from the moonland. Plus it's clearly not gross if Japan thinks precious bodily fluids are appropriate for cocktails.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:34 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Well it's Japan that did that. Xard is simply informing us of it, which is always great and he deserves the thanks for going through the effort to bring us news from the moonland. Plus it's clearly not gross if Japan thinks precious bodily fluids are appropriate for cocktails.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:36 pm That's why I want to know the source. Whether this is actually super proper official or just someone messing around on the side. Either way I personally find it more hilarious than disturbing or in poor taste.

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Feb 20, 2014 9:52 pm I'd love to see Anno's reaction to this.
